title: Total Valkyrien
body:
## Everything valkyrien, all in one place!

As many Valkyrien Skies addons as possible! Carefully balanced for maximum stability! The ultimate physics experience!

Carefully setup to avoid all the most common of bugs with valkyrien skies!

---

**If you are looking for a more minimal modpack, then checkout my [Sixth Valkyrien](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sixth-valkyrien) pack**


---

**Addon list:**

_Forge_

- CC: VS
- Clockwork
- Control Craft
- Counter Clockwise
- Create: Interactive
- Create: Propulsion
- Create: Valkyrien Logistics
- Drive-By-Wire
- Genesis
- Eureka
- HexySkies
- JadeVS
- Kontraption
- Reins Mod
- Ship Retrieval Servie
- Starlance
- TIS-VS
- Trackwork
- Valkyrien Relogs
- Valkyrien Sails
- Valkyrien Warium
- VMod
- VS Chunkloader
- VS Hose Connectors
- VS: Tournament
- VSPrinter
- VSplit
- VStuff

_Fabric w/ Connector_

- Valkyrien Pirates
- Ship in a bottle

**Other mods (excluding dependencies):**

_Remove these as you like, but be warned against adding additional mods. There may be incompatibilities!_

- Create Big Cannons
- Create Deco
- Create: Diesel Generators
- Create: Connected
- Create: Copycats+
- Create: Steam n Rails
- Create: Tweaked Controllers
- Embeddium
- Embeddium++
- Colorwheel + Colorwheel patcher
- Radium
- Immersive Optimisations
- Just Enough Items
- Oculus
- Simple Backups
- Spark

---

### Common issues:

#### Contraptions aren't interactive:
Create: Interactive now requires contraptions to have the "interact-me" block on them to be made interactive. You can disable this in the Create: Interactive server config if you wish.
